value.found_quote: We classify requests to GPT-5 into risk thresholds. ... To help ensure safety in your use of the OpenAI API and tools, we run safety checks on our own models, including all fine-tuned models, and on the computer use tool. ... Cyber Safety ... Fine-tuning safety ... Safety checks in computer use
value.rationale: The page directly substantiates all key elements of the claim: (1) OpenAI classifies requests to GPT-5 into risk thresholds ("We classify requests to GPT-5 into risk thresholds"); (2) dedicated safety checks run across model usage, tools, fine-tuning, and cybersecurity (the "Other types of safety checks" section references Cyber Safety, Fine-tuning safety, and Safety checks in computer use); and (3) escalating consequences for hazardous requests (delayed streaming, blocked model access for individual users, and eventual org-wide access revocation). The page presents these features as currently active and operational.
